heading: Today
text: Hazy sun, hot humid. Widely scattered late-day showers and storms, some severe.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Isolated evening showers and strong thunderstorms. Very warm and muggy.

heading: Friday
text: Sunny, hot, humid. A spotty, late-day storm.

heading: Saturday
text: A good chance of showers and thunderstorms north, scattered south.
